health.narrative: Best-in-class fundamentals: +56% FY25 revenue, ~46% adj op margin, $2.1B FCF, zero long-term debt. Rule-of-X >110. Story has fully shifted from fundamentals risk to valuation risk.

pre_announcement_drift.implied_signal: Defensive positioning into print: stock -22% YTD, -31% from highs, software cohort de-rating (NOW/IBM misses). Options-implied 10.5% post-print move, lower than Q3'25 setup. Pre-print pessimism marginally improves base-case risk/reward.

scenario.base_case: Rev $1.55-1.60B, FY26 raised to $7.30-7.40B. Consensus +4% beat; T+1 -3% to +5% chop, T+5 drifts to flat-to-up. Probability ~50%.
scenario.beat_case: Rev >$1.62B, FY26 raised to $7.5B+. Replay of Q4'25 reaction: T+1 +10-18%, sustains through T+5. Probability ~30%.
scenario.miss_case: Rev <=$1.55B with FY26 reiterated at $7.18-7.20B (no raise) reads as a soft print given whisper $7.4B+; T+1 -10% to -15%, fwd P/E re-rates toward 85x. Outright miss (rev below guide) ~5% tail, T+1 -20%+. Probability of soft scenario ~15%.

risks.label: Valuation compression
risks.rationale: Fwd P/E ~109x vs SaaS peer median ~18x; multiple is the dominant near-term return driver. Any growth-durability doubt risks 30%+ derate.

risks.label: Guidance under-raise
risks.rationale: Buyside whisper FY26 ~$7.4B+. Reiterating $7.18-7.20B insufficient given Q4'25 momentum.

risks.label: AIP commercial deceleration
risks.rationale: US-Comm +137% YoY Q4'25 is a hard comp. Sequential decel even to +90% read as topping.

risks.label: Government concentration / political
risks.rationale: ~55% of revenue is US Gov. Defense-AI tailwind supportive; recurring DOJ/FTC data-practices tail risk.

risks.label: Insider 10b5-1 selling pace
risks.rationale: Continued sizable insider sales (Karp, Cohen) act as sentiment headwind on weak tape.

risks.label: Software-sector risk-off
risks.rationale: NOW/IBM April 2026 misses dragged PLTR -8%. High cohort beta during multiple-compression cycles.

risks.label: SBC dilution
risks.rationale: Stock-based comp ~20%+ of revenue; GAAP-vs-adjusted gap large; falling stock compounds dilution.

risks.label: No buyback offset
risks.rationale: Buyback authorization not material vs. SBC; share count rises ~3-5%/yr.
